overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk black market weapon shop from Cyberpunk 2077. The player explores the dimly lit industrial space with neon green and red lighting, examining weapon displays, interacting with vendors, and viewing holographic weapon schematics. The environment features concrete floors, metal shelving, and futuristic technology.

scene_state.functional_zone: weapon shop entry with floor displays and main counter

events.description: camera passes crouching customer on the left side
slowing down as approaching the vendor counter

agents.ego_description: moving through weapon displays toward the main counter

notable_agents.action: crouching down examining weapons on the floor
vendor standing behind counter waiting for customers

entered.detail: rows of rifles and shotguns laid out on red carpet
metal counter with green neon overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The player enters the weapon shop, passing a crouching customer examining goods on the left. The camera moves forward through aisles of weapons laid out on the floor, approaching the main counter where a vendor stands beneath green neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: main shop floor with scattered customers

events.description: turning left and moving away from the counter to explore
entering area with other customers browsing weapons

agents.ego_description: circulating around the main shop floor examining displays

notable_agents.action: customer in red jacket standing with arms crossed
customer in dark clothing browsing weapon racks

entered.detail: metal table with various firearms arranged for display
tall shelving units stacked with ammunition boxes
concrete stairs leading to back corridor

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the counter, the player explores the main shop floor where several customers stand among weapon displays. The space opens up to show shelving units with ammunition boxes and a stairway leading to the back corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: back corridor with weapon storage racks

events.description: entering narrow back corridor from main shop floor
lighting becomes dimmer and more green-tinted in the corridor

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and moving through the narrow back corridor

entered.detail: dense wall-mounted racks holding rifles and shotguns
metal shelf with cleaning supplies and tools
dim green emergency light illuminating the corridor

segments.scene_description: The player moves into a narrow back corridor with concrete stairs. The walls are densely packed with weapon racks holding rifles and shotguns, illuminated by dim green emergency lighting. The area is isolated with no other people present.

events.description: exiting corridor back to main shop floor
approaching workbench with active drone and mechanic
holographic weapon displays become visible above tables

agents.ego_description: examining the workbench and holographic weapon displays

notable_agents.action: mechanic working on drone at workbench using tools

entered.detail: metal workbench with tools and electronic equipment
small spherical drone with green glowing core being repaired
bright articulated lamp illuminating the workbench
large floating holographic projection of a rifle schematic

segments.scene_description: Returning to the main floor, the player approaches a workbench where a mechanic is repairing a small drone under a bright desk lamp. The camera then reveals large holographic weapon schematics floating above display tables, with neon green lighting illuminating the far wall where other customers browse.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dimly lit cyberpunk weapon shop, moving from the crowded main sales floor into a secluded industrial corridor before returning to a high-tech workshop area. It begins by passing a crouching customer and navigating aisles of floor-laid weaponry toward a vendor stationed beneath vibrant green neon lights. As the camera moves away from the counter, the space opens up to reveal ammunition shelving and a stairway, leading the viewer away from the crowd and into a narrow back corridor of concrete stairs and densely packed weapon racks under dim emergency lighting. The scene then shifts back toward the main floor, approaching a workbench where a mechanic repairs a drone under a bright desk lamp. Finally, the view expands to reveal large holographic weapon schematics floating above display tables, with neon green light illuminating the far wall where other customers browse.
